svg.title: NServiceBus loan broker scatter-gather diagram, landscape
svg.desc: A client endpoint sends a command to a Loan Broker endpoint. Inside the broker, a saga orchestrates the request: a handler enriches it with a credit score via a synchronous call to an external service, the saga reads and writes its own persisted state, then publishes a QuoteRequested event. Three bank endpoints subscribe to that event, each with a handler that uses the outbox pattern, and reply with a command back to the broker's saga, which correlates the replies. Once all replies are in or a timeout fires, the saga publishes a LoanQuotesReady event that both the client endpoint and a notifications endpoint subscribe to.
